complementaryLinePrice.title: Complementary Line Price
complementaryLinePrice.description: Grounded line price for the complementary quantity. If blank, do not state a line price.

complementaryProductId.title: Complementary Product Id
complementaryProductId.description: Id of the complementary item. Pass with the primary id to add_to_cart.

complementaryUnitPrice.title: Complementary Unit Price
complementaryUnitPrice.description: Grounded unit price from the standard pricebook. If blank, do not state a price.

dataCloudChurnRisk.title: Data Cloud Churn Risk
dataCloudChurnRisk.description: Account augmentation risk signal used by the strategy engine when available.

dataCloudNextBestAction.title: Data Cloud Next Best Action
dataCloudNextBestAction.description: Account augmentation next-best-action guidance used by the strategy engine when available.

dataCloudSegment.title: Data Cloud Segment
dataCloudSegment.description: Account augmentation segment used by the strategy engine when available.

discountPercent.title: Discount Percent
discountPercent.description: The discount percent from the matrix.

primaryLinePrice.title: Primary Line Price
primaryLinePrice.description: Grounded line price for the primary quantity. If blank, do not state a line price.

primaryProductId.title: Primary Product Id
primaryProductId.description: Id of the recommended coffee. Remember this; if the shopper rejects it, pass it back in excludeProductIdsCsv on the next call.

primaryUnitPrice.title: Primary Unit Price
primaryUnitPrice.description: Grounded unit price from the standard pricebook. If blank, do not state a price.

relaxedAxesCsv.title: Relaxed Axes
relaxedAxesCsv.description: Preference axes the engine had to relax to find a match (e.g. 'brew style'). If non-empty, tell the shopper what couldn't be matched.
